title: pterotheca glareosa
side_effects: Pterotheca glareosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach ulcers, in individuals with sensitive stomachs or pre-existing gastrointestinal conditions. Additionally, improper use of this plant can lead to allergic reactions, including skin rashes and respiratory distress, in people with compromised immune systems. In rare cases, excessive consumption of pterotheca glareosa may cause cardiovascular problems, including increased heart rate and blood pressure, which can be life-threatening for people with pre-existing heart conditions. Furthermore, prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can result in neurological damage, including memory loss and cognitive impairment, in individuals who do not use it correctly.
